## Rule Title

Name of the Sigma rule.

## Sigma YAML

```yaml
title: Rule Title
level: high
tags:
  - attack.tXXXX
detection:
  keywords:
    - "keyword1"
    - "keyword2"
  condition: keywords
```

## Threat Description

What threat does this rule detect?

## False Positive Considerations

Known scenarios that might trigger false positives.

## References

- [Link to relevant threat report]
